recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: optimum-neuron
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: Optimum Neuron serves as the bridge between Hugging Face libraries, such as Transformers, Diffusers, and PEFT, and AWS Trainium and Inferentia accelerators. It provides a set of tools enabling easy model loading, training, and inference on both single and multiple Neuron core configurations, across a wide range of downstream tasks.
